plan-comparison.label: Plan Comparison
plan-comparison.description: Compare candidate approaches, tradeoffs, open questions, and decision criteria.

implementation-plan.label: Implementation Plan
implementation-plan.description: Convert the implementation plan and verification strategy into a scannable delivery surface.

code-review.label: Code Review
code-review.description: Summarize review findings, severity, evidence, and residual risks.

status-report.label: Status Report
status-report.description: Show current task status, proof, blockers, resource state, and follow-ups.

incident-report.label: Incident Report
incident-report.description: Explain incident context, diagnosis, fix, validation, and prevention work.

release-report.label: Release Report
release-report.description: Package final release evidence, risk state, unverified items, and sign-off readiness.
